checks.name: linting
checks.message: pnpm lint fails with a pre-existing ESLint 9 circular-structure error caused by .eslintrc.json + next/core-web-vitals config incompatibility (present on main branch; not introduced by this task). Additionally, AssetRow.tsx imports `formatTokenValue` from @fepvenancio/stela-sdk but never uses it — formatDisplayAmount from @/lib/format is used instead. This unused import would normally be flagged by no-unused-vars but is masked by the broken lint runner.
